From: Eng manager
To: BI

Draw the lineage picture for the small payments slice — everything's documented:

ddl.sql: CREATE TABLE ACCOUNTS (id INT PRIMARY KEY); CREATE TABLE CHARGES (charge_id INT
PRIMARY KEY, account_id INT REFERENCES ACCOUNTS(id), amount DECIMAL);
vw_daily_charges.sql: CREATE VIEW vw_daily_charges AS SELECT c.account_id, SUM(c.amount)
FROM CHARGES c GROUP BY 1;
landscape.md (from groundwork, owner-confirmed): "job load_charges (Airflow, owner S. Lee,
confirmed 06-08) loads CHARGES nightly from the billing API; vw_daily_charges is read by
the Finance dashboard (confirmed by Finance, 06-08)."
